learning: The TUI inputarea already had in-memory history (history.go) but Up/Down keys were intercepted by viewport scroll before reaching it — always verify key routing in BubbleTea Update() chains
BubbleTea's WindowSizeMsg recreates components — persistent state (like history) needs an external store (historyStore field) synced before/after resize to prevent data loss
Down-at-draft-position must be a no-op (AtDraft guard) — otherwise pressing Down while typing wipes input since history.Down() returns empty draft string
Regex matching @tokens in user text MUST require path-like prefixes (/, ./, ../, ~/) — bare @word matches email addresses and @mentions, which is a critical UX regression
File contents inlined into prompts need XML/CDATA escaping — unescaped </file> in file content enables XML injection and prompt corruption
Use os.Lstat (not os.Stat) when reading user-specified paths to detect symlinks — os.Stat follows symlinks silently, enabling arbitrary file read
On input expansion failure in BubbleTea, restore input text via SetValue before returning — CommandSubmittedMsg clears the input, so errors lose the user's work
Use 0o700 for directories and 0o600 for files storing user data — 0o755/0o644 exposes session prompts to other users on shared systems
Atomic file writes (write to .tmp then os.Rename) prevent corruption when Save() is called on hot paths like every RunStartedMsg
Orphaned BubbleTea components (like sessionpicker) may have full implementations with tests but zero wiring — always check model.go for actual usage before assuming a feature works
When switching TUI sessions, clear the viewport and show a system message — silently changing conversationID without visual feedback is deceptive UX

strings.Index returns byte offsets — using them to slice the original string after strings.ToLower is unsafe because ToLower can change byte length for certain Unicode chars (Turkish İ, German ẞ). Always use rune-based indexing for case-insensitive search.
extractSnippet with byte-based window (content[start:end]) can split multi-byte UTF-8 runes mid-character — convert to []rune for windowed slicing and add ellipsis (…) for truncation indicators
Search overlay results need pagination/scroll cap — rendering all matches as a flat string overflows the terminal for common search terms in long conversations
Always use url.PathEscape for user-supplied values in URL paths and url.Values for query parameters — string concatenation enables path traversal and parameter injection
CLI subcommands should reject extra positional arguments (fs.NArg() > expected) — silently ignoring extras leads to user confusion when only the first arg is processed
AskUserTimeoutMsg must carry CallID to prevent stale timers from dismissing newer prompts — race condition between consecutive SSE events for the same run
HTTP calls in BubbleTea Cmds must use http.Client{Timeout} not http.DefaultClient — hung server blocks the Cmd goroutine indefinitely
Non-TUI deadline enforcement: parse DeadlineAt as time.Time and check before prompting user — prevents wasted user input on expired questions
MCP stdio server must filter context.Canceled and io.EOF on shutdown — otherwise process supervisors see exit code 1 on normal Ctrl-C
Signal-listening goroutines must select on ctx.Done() alongside the signal channel to avoid leaking when server exits via EOF or error
BridgeTools must guard against nil Handler in tool catalog — nil handler causes panic on first MCP call
mark3labs/mcp-go v0.46.0 NewToolWithRawSchema is the correct API for bridging arbitrary JSON schemas — avoids lossy schema conversion
